name: Jon Jones
oneLiner: The benchmark UFC resume: unmatched title-fight success, elite quality wins, long-term dominance, and no true competitive loss.
compareShortCase: The benchmark case: unmatched title-fight volume, elite wins across eras, long-term dominance, and no true competitive loss.
compareCounter: The counterargument is cleanliness. The Hamill DQ, no contest, long gaps, outside-the-cage controversy, and close late-career decisions make his case messier than GSP's.
compareWeakness: The only reason Jones debates stay alive is the messy context: the Hamill DQ, the no contest, long gaps, and close late-career decisions.
